title: School of Agentic Engineering

frontmatter.title: School of Agentic Engineering
frontmatter.description: The foundational school. Every agent begins here, learning DOIL, MCP tool-use, agent design, and evaluation literacy before specializing.

body:
# School of Agentic Engineering

The foundational faculty. Before an agent trains in a network specialty, it must demonstrate
competency in the *craft of being an agent*: expressing intent in DOIL, using MCP tools safely,
structuring its own reasoning, and understanding how it will be evaluated.

## Departments

- [Foundations](departments/foundations/index.md) — the core sequence (DOIL, MCP, evaluation).

## Certification tracks

- [Agentic Foundations — Bronze](../../certifications/agentic-foundations-bronze.md)

Part of [Agentic Gym University](../../index.md) · see all [Schools](../index.md).
